title: 1st Runner-Up – TIT Technotsav Challenge 2026
summary: Secured 1st Runner-Up position in the TIT Technotsav Challenge 2026 hosted by Technocrats Institute of Technology (TIT), Bhopal. Awarded a ₹15,000 cash prize for delivering an innovative and impactful solution, demonstrating strong technical expertise, teamwork, and presentation skills.
details: Participated in the TIT Technotsav Challenge 2026 organized by Technocrats Institute of Technology (TIT), Bhopal. As part of a collaborative team, developed and presented an innovative solution addressing real-world challenges. The project was recognized for its technical implementation, creativity, and overall impact, earning the team the 1st Runner-Up position and a ₹15,000 cash prize. This achievement highlights excellence in problem-solving, software development, teamwork, and effective project presentation in a competitive environment.
